channel.title: Defcon, Hardware Hacking, Qemu, Embedded Devices, on Dan [the] Salmon
channel.description: Recent content in Defcon, Hardware Hacking, Qemu, Embedded Devices, on Dan [the] Salmon

item.title: DEF CON 33 - Emulating Embedded Linux Devices at Scale w LightTouch Firmware Rehosting - S Polke
item.description: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=f-LTMUFQzjQ Really great talk about a very interesting problem: creating VMs that can run unmodified device firmware to emulate complicated devices like routers.
